title: Better Recipes & Trades for Superflat
description: Crafting Recipes & Villager Trades boost for Superflat Survival (Fishing, Mob Loot, Trading, Villages, Chinese and Desert Sellers & etc)
body:
##  Better Recipes & Trades for Superflat Survival

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ef0373098fb7a9ee029c3f9ad99ec3aead86b3_0.webp)

**Mod include Many new Recipes and Villager trades for Superflat Survival: mob eggs, spawners, nametags, redstone, smelting, coppers, modified fishing loot and Custom Villagers**

##  All Recipes in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/better-recipes-for-superflat/gallery)
## 
### Other:
[**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-recipes-trades-for-superflat)

[**PlanetMinecraft**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/better-recipes-amp-trades-for-superflat/)
```
For better experience use JEI, REI, or EMI
```
